title: Google AI Model Catalog EXPLODES! Which LLM to Choose? #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof reviews Google's expanding AI model catalog and discusses the decision-making challenge for practitioners choosing between available LLMs. The video highlights Google's growing portfolio of models aimed at developers and AI innovators.
